'''''CX-14''''' was a [[cargolift vessel]] in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] warrior clans. When the Mandalorians threatened the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Serroco]] in [[3963 BBY]], ''CX-14'' was attached to [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Saul Karath]]'s<ref name="serroco" /> [[Battle Group Serroco]],<ref name="karath" /> a task force intended to protect the world from Mandalorian attack. In the ensuing [[Battle of Serroco|battle]], Serroco was [[Battle of Serroco|devastated]] with [[Nuclear weapon/Legends|nuclear missiles]],<ref name="kotor15">[[Knights of the Old Republic 15|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 15]]</ref> and ''CX-14'' was lost. The [[Starship/Legends|vessel's]] destruction was later noted in an [[The Admiral's List: Remember Serroco! Edition|edition]] of ''[[The Admiral's List]]'', an official publication issued by the Republic Navy, along with two other cargolift vessels: ''[[CX-03]]'' and ''[[CX-09]]''.<ref name="serroco" />

==Behind the scenes==
''CX-14'' was first mentioned in ''[[The Admiral's List: Remember Serroco! Edition]]'', an in-universe news report<ref name="serroco" /> appearing on the back page of [[Knights of the Old Republic 17|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 17]], written by [[John Jackson Miller]] and released in [[2007]].<ref name="kotor17">[[Knights of the Old Republic 17|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 17]]</ref>
